channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Senator Cassidy Backs Erica Schwartz for CDC Director
item.description: Senate HELP Committee Chairman Bill Cassidy announced Thursday he will support President Trump's nominee for CDC director.

item.title: Trump Tech Adviser Briefed on OpenAI Incident
item.description: White House tech adviser Michael Kratsios was briefed on an OpenAI model going rogue and is monitoring the situation.

item.title: House Votes to Limit Trump's Iran War Powers; Senate Supports President
item.description: The Republican-led House passed a resolution Thursday directing President Trump to halt U.S. military action against Iran.

item.title: States Sue Trump Administration Over Disaster Funding Conditions
item.description: More than two dozen states sued the Trump administration Thursday over conditions requiring compliance with election and immigration policies.
